_comment: Shared golden fixture pinning the allowed_files control-path classifier to identical output across the two parallel implementations: Go isControlPath (cli/gh-student/internal/submitcmd/submit.go) and Python _is_control_path (cli/gh-teacher/skeleton/dotgithub/scripts/runner.py). Control paths are force-kept regardless of allowed_files. Each case is a (path -> is_control) expectation asserted by both ignorematch/copysubmittable Go tests and the Python runner tests, so the two keep-sets can't drift. Directory controls (.github, .git) match by exact name or '/' prefix; file controls (.classroom50.yaml, result.json, release-body.md) match exactly, so a sibling like 'result.json.bak' is NOT a control path.
